prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is F-101 Structural framing within 2.6 Carpentry & Finishes. The relevant subcategory is 2.6.1 Rough Framing. The field notes describe visible cues consistent with: visible cue/visible cue visible cue IRC limits (notch depth vs. joist depth - measurable in photo). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors IRC R502, R602. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T3 F-101 Measurement & estimation
